text: A heavily regularized DNN trained with cosine annealing warm restarts and stochastic weight averaging achieved mean absolute error of 39.2±1.2 s.
source_excerpt:
The best results were obtained by a heavily regularized DNN trained with 
cosine annealing warm restarts and stochastic weight averaging, achieving a 
mean and median absolute errors of 39.2±1.2 s and 17.2 ± 0.9 s, respectively

super_pattern.subject: heavily regularized DNN with cosine annealing and stochastic weight averaging
